2144900.name: Black Forest - Content Pack
2144900.description:
This DLC for Black Forest contains more levels and stories to play. Each level is a unique experience and a fresh look at the game. There are four new maps each at several difficulty levels.

Also, you support the ongoing development of the game. Black Forest is made by a solo developer, and the additional artwork, systems, assets, etc. all cost money. The game itself being free, the DLC packs are the cash flow that pays for the game. And your opportunity to say "this is a great game, I'd pay for it".

Like the main game, this DLC is a work in progress and will receive future updates.

DLC Contents

  • 4 new maps
  • 3 easy difficulty levels
  • 2 medium difficulty levels
  • 3 hard difficulty levels
  • 1 doomed difficulty level
  • 2 sandbox levels
  • 1 new story (upcoming)
  • ...more to come...

Antoburg


A prosperous village on a winter map. Available in easy, where they are well-prepared for the winter, and hard where they are ill-prepared. Also the scene of a new story.

Farmstead


A single extended family living isolated in the forest. The low workforce is your main challenge. Playable at medium and hard difficulty, or as a sandbox game.

Neudorf


A calm village with minimal threat level. Can be played at easy or medium difficulty. Or, to change things up, in doomed where the calm makes way to some very serious threats...

Swinvale


A large and sprawling village in the mountains, playable on easy or hard. Some rare challenges and a layout not easy to defend well.
2144900.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
